name: bigquery-data-analytics
description: Connect, query, and generate data insights for BigQuery datasets and data.

settings.name: Project ID
settings.description: ID of the Google Cloud project

settings.name: Use Client OAuth
settings.description: (Optional) Whether to use client OAuth (default: false)

settings.name: Max Query Result Rows
settings.description: (Optional) Maximum number of query result rows (default: 50)
